documents.name: Cover Letter
documents.notes: Clean and professional. No changes needed.

documents.name: Proposal
documents.notes: Strong overall but needs pricing clarification and timeline adjustment.

documents.name: Signature Page
documents.notes: Waiting on legal review of terms section.

decisions.note: The scope section mentions 'all core user flows' but does not explicitly list account creation and password reset flows. Please confirm these are included.
Essential tier at $85K does not include post-launch optimization. Can a 15-day optimization period be added to this tier for an additional fee?
Payment schedule shows 30% at kickoff. Our standard vendor terms are 20% at kickoff. Can this be adjusted?
Timeline shows 14 weeks total. Our internal launch deadline is September 1. Starting May 1, that gives us 17 weeks of buffer. Acceptable.
Approved as-is. Good job referencing the Healthcare Summit conversation.
Legal is reviewing the termination clause (term #7). Expected response by April 12.
Term #5 mentions $250/hour for additional revisions. Is this negotiable for a retainer arrangement?

summary_notes: Overall strong proposal. Redline Digital clearly understands our needs and the outdoor e-commerce space. Main open items: (1) scope clarification on account flows, (2) pricing flexibility on Essential tier, (3) legal review of termination clause. Targeting approval by April 15 if open items are resolved.
